title: NTLM
overview: NTLM (NT LAN Manager) is a suite of Microsoft authentication protocols that uses a challenge-response mechanism to verify user identities without transmitting passwords in cleartext.

study.overview: NTLM (NT LAN Manager) is a suite of Microsoft authentication protocols that uses a challenge-response mechanism to verify user identities without transmitting passwords in cleartext.
